startPoint.en: Speak to Leela in Draynor Village.
startPoint.es: Habla con Leela en Draynor Village.

items.name: Fire rune
items.display: 20 fire runes (cannot be substituted by a staff that provides fire runes)

recommended.name: Explorer's ring 3
recommended.display: The explorer's ring 3 and above to teleport to Draynor, access to the Draynor lodestone, War's Retreat Teleport, or a charged amulet of glory

recommended.name: Fairy ring
recommended.display: Access to fairy rings to reach Uzer Mastaba (code DLQ)

recommended.name: Ring of duelling
recommended.display: A charged ring of duelling, broomstick, or access to the Al Kharid lodestone

recommended.name: Desert robe
recommended.display: Desert robes, an enchanted water tiara or waterskins

recommended.name: Prayer potion
recommended.display: Some food and prayer potions (have your prayer points full before entering the pyramid the second time)

rewards.name: Amascut (scenery)
rewards.display: Access to the Amascut statue in Senliten's tomb, giving extra prayer points at the cost of some life points.

postQuest.display: Experience earned while completing the mummy: 2,100 experience 2,100 experience 5,000 experience 6,500 experience 3,350 experience 3,000 experience

postQuest.name: Cave-in (Uzer Mastaba)
postQuest.display: Ability to clear the shortcut found in the Uzer Mastaba

text.en: 3 backpack spaces
armour and weapons
Talk to Leela, north of the Draynor Village jail.
text.es: Habla con Leela, al norte de la cárcel de Draynor Village.

text.en: If Leela does not show up in Draynor Village, you need to complete the Stolen Hearts and Diamond in the Rough quests first, even if Icthlarin's Little Helper is already completed.
text.es: Si Leela no aparece en Draynor Village, primero debes completar las misiones Stolen Hearts y Diamond in the Rough, aunque ya hayas terminado Icthlarin's Little Helper.

text.en: Enter the flat-topped pyramid Uzer Mastaba from the west side, south of Uzer.
text.es: Entra en la pirámide de techo plano Uzer Mastaba por el lado oeste, al sur de Uzer.

text.en: Teleport to the fairy ring DLQ and then run east.
text.es: Teletranspórtate al círculo de hadas DLQ y luego corre hacia el este.

text.en: Teleport to Al Kharid and go south to Shantay's Pass (Or use amulet of glory's teleport to Al Kharid).
text.es: Teletranspórtate a Al Kharid y ve al sur hacia Shantay's Pass (o usa la teletransportación a Al Kharid del amulet of glory).

text.en: Use the magic carpet network to get to Uzer.
text.es: Usa la red de alfombras mágicas para llegar a Uzer.

text.en: Teleport with the traveller's necklace to desert eagles' eyrie.
text.es: Teletranspórtate con el traveller's necklace al desert eagles' eyrie.

text.en: In the initial east chamber, rummage and kill the skeleton for a canopic jar.
text.es: En la cámara inicial del este, rebusca y mata al esqueleto para conseguir un canopic jar.

text.en: Head north-west and through the imposing doors to the south.
text.es: Dirígete al noroeste y atraviesa las imponentes puertas hacia el sur.

text.en: Kill the four skeletons in the room for a mummy hand and the scroll of the dead. The mummy hand and scroll of the dead don't appear in area loot, you need to right click to take them.
text.es: Mata a los cuatro esqueletos de la sala para conseguir una mummy hand y el scroll of the dead. La mummy hand y el scroll of the dead no aparecen en el botín de área, debes hacer clic derecho para cogerlos.

text.en: Return to Leela in Draynor Village.
text.es: Vuelve con Leela en Draynor Village.

chatOptions: 5 I think I can deal with this myself.

text.en: Al Kharid flyer, Sq'irkjuice, ring of charos (a)
The scroll of praise:
text.es: El scroll of praise:

text.en: Get an Al Kharid flyer from Waseem the Leaflet Dropper north of the Al Kharid mine (at the entrance to the desert).
text.es: Consigue un Al Kharid flyer de Waseem the Leaflet Dropper, al norte de la mina de Al Kharid (en la entrada al desierto).

text.en: With your Al Kharid flyer, talk to Reldo in the Varrock palace library about the pyramid. or He will give you a scroll of praise.
text.es: Con tu Al Kharid flyer, habla con Reldo en la biblioteca del palacio de Varrock sobre la pirámide. o Te dará un scroll of praise.

chatOptions: 3 I'd like to talk about a pyramid.
4 I'd like to talk about a pyramid.

text.en: The copied name papyrus and mummy's name papyrus:
text.es: El copied name papyrus y el mummy's name papyrus:

text.en: Play the Sorceress's Garden minigame and obtain a mug of any sq'irkjuice.
text.es: Juega al minijuego Sorceress's Garden y consigue una mug of any sq'irkjuice.

text.en: You need to use the sq'irkjuice on Ali Morrisane at his stall. Then talk with him. .
text.es: Debes usar el sq'irkjuice en Ali Morrisane en su puesto. Luego habla con él..

chatOptions: 3 I have some questions about a tomb.
1 I'm after ways to reunite the mummy in the pyramid.
4 I can't think of anything sensible to ask.

text.en: Talk to him again with a ring of charos (a) equipped. .
text.es: Habla con él de nuevo llevando puesto un ring of charos (a)..

chatOptions: 3 I have some questions about a tomb.
1 I'm after ways to reunite the mummy in the pyramid.
4 I can't think of anything sensible to ask.

text.en: This step will only work after talking to the Wise Old Man during the Garden of Tranquillity, as the ring does not allow you to persuade people before this step.
text.es: Este paso solo funcionará después de hablar con el Wise Old Man durante Garden of Tranquillity, ya que el anillo no permite persuadir a la gente antes de ese punto.

text.en: You should have received both a copied name papyrus and a mummy's name papyrus.
text.es: Deberías haber recibido tanto un copied name papyrus como un mummy's name papyrus.

text.en: Do not destroy the copied name papyrus or you will have to re-obtain a sq'irkjuice for another copy.
text.es: No destruyas el copied name papyrus o tendrás que conseguir otro sq'irkjuice para obtener una nueva copia. ===Recolectando los canopic jars===

text.en: 20 fire rune, 1 willow log, jug of wine, spice, empty pot, and wheat
Place jar on the shelves 4 times.
text.es: Vuelve a la pirámide con puntos de oración.

text.en: Fill the empty sarcophagus.
text.es: De nuevo, abre la imponente puerta en la esquina noroeste.

text.en: Pray at the 5 broken statues.
text.es: Mata al golem y baja las escaleras ''(es posible que aparezcas en la tumba de la momia después de bajar las escaleras, tras el puzle. Si es así, tendrás que cruzar el puzle para hacer los siguientes 4 pasos)''.

text.en: This requires 150 prayer points.
text.es: Encuentra un camino de bloques azules y verdes, o de bloques rojos y amarillos, que atraviese todo el recorrido.

text.en: Repair the chair and table.
text.es: Cruza la sala de baldosas y recoge el primer canopic jar al oeste de la escalera del norte.

text.en: Use spice on your jug of wine.
text.es: Si apareces al pie de la escalera del norte, simplemente recoge el canopic jar que está al oeste.

text.en: Use wheat on your empty pot.
text.es: Recoge los dos canopic jars restantes y la momia sin mano en los túneles. Si no recogiste la cuarta antes, puedes encontrarla en uno de los cuerpos de esqueleto arriba. "Rebusca" en ellos y derrótalos.

text.en: Replace the pot and jug.
text.es: Usa la mummy hand en la momia sin mano.

text.en: Run east and kill the shadow. Then light the enchanted sconces in the following order: south, north, west, east. Shadows will spawn and must be killed between each sconce lighting.
text.es: Vuelve a la sala de baldosas y crúzala de regreso hacia el sarcófago vacío.

text.en: Return to the Queen's chamber and create the statue on the empty base, then carve it 2 times.
text.es: Puedes subir las escaleras y volver a bajarlas para teletransportarte a la sala de la tumba y saltarte el puzle de baldosas.

text.en: Talk to the Pharaoh Queen who has appeared in front of the table to give her the 2 papyri and the Scroll of Praise. (Not required for quest completion, only for 100% rebuild)
text.es: Coloca el jar en las estanterías 4 veces.

chatOptions: 5 I have nothing more to say.

text.en: Right-click check-progress on your scroll of the dead or pyramid journal to verify you've rebuilt the mummy 75%. Otherwise, check any parts missed. (Or 100% if you want to finish the mummy)
text.es: Llena el sarcófago vacío.

text.en: Talk to Leela in Draynor Village.
text.es: Reza ante las 5 estatuas rotas.

text.en: Quest complete!
text.es: Esto requiere 150 puntos de oración.
